autonomy_verdict.reasoning_chain: [INFERENCE] Deployment is attributed to an EOA (contract creator). The earliest observed funding into that EOA comes from an external address (often a bridge). This pattern is compatible with a human (or human-operated agent) preparing gas, and does not by itself establish autonomous fee-accumulation funding.

evidence_for: EOA deployer requires a signer; observed external funding into deployer wallet.
evidence_against: An AI agent could still control the EOA signer key. [UNVERIFIED]

evidence_for: Narrative claims exist in off-chain sources. [UNVERIFIED]
evidence_against: No on-chain proof of self-funded deployment from accrued fees was extracted here.
